mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TB_NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_NO>(SELECT MAX(NOTICE_NO)-10 FROM TB_NOTICE) AND NOTICE_NO <= (SELECT MAX(NOTICE_NO) FROM TB_NOTICE) ORDER BY NOTICE_NO DESC
SELECT NOTICE_NO, NOTICE_TITLE, PROFESSOR_NO, NOTICE_DATE, NOTICE_VIEW FROM TB_NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_NOTICE VALUES( NOTICE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContent}, #{professorNo}, SYSDATE, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE SET TB_NOTICE VALUES( NOTICE_TITLE = #{noticeTitle}, NOTICE_CONTENT = #{noticeContent}, PROFESSOR_NO = #{professorNo}, )
